Tests the bitwise XOR operation in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple script that demonstrates the use of the bitwise XOR operator in JavaScript. It declares a variable `a` and assigns it the result of the expression `1 ^ 3`, which evaluates to `2`. The script then uses an `assert` function to verify that the value of `a` is equal to `2`. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a basic operation with bitwise operators and a simple assertion for validation.
